svg.title: Milestone Roadmap M1–M8
svg.desc: Eight milestones with dependencies. M1 Bootstrap and M2 Vault are complete; M2 MariaDB migration is the next active task. M3 auth foundation, M4 connector framework, then observability/quality/CI-CD/production readiness.
svg.text: Homelab + AWS Test · 런북 / 복구 / 롤백
